TABLE.NAME: tool_musudo_sudoer
TABLE.COMMENT: People allowed to use sudo plugin to get elevated permissions

FIELD.NAME: mfarequired
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 means MFA factor required, 0 means not required

FIELD.NAME: privilegesjson
FIELD.COMMENT: JSON encoded pairs of roles and context ids

FIELD.NAME: timecreated
FIELD.COMMENT: When was the sudo user added

KEY.NAME: userid
KEY.COMMENT: Only one set of extra roles for each user
